channel.title: Latest articles from the Shopify Engineering Blog - Shopify
channel.description: Latest stories and resources from the teams who build and scale Shopify, the leading cloud-based, multi-channel commerce platform.

image.title: Latest articles from the Shopify Engineering Blog - Shopify

item.title: AI & Machine Learning | Ecommerce tips & how tos
item.description: Read posts about AI & Machine Learning on Ecommerce Marketing Blog - Ecommerce News, Online Store Tips & More. Interact with a community of savvy online store owners.
item.dc:creator: Shopify

item.title: Clustering billions of products for agentic commerce with Catalog API (2026)
item.description: How Shopify built an LLM-powered pipeline to match product listings across millions of merchants into a unified catalog that AI agents can search.
item.dc:creator: Mariya MansurovaMariya Mansurova

item.title: Teaching Sidekick to say no: automated data curation with LLM judge consensus (2026)
item.description: Our Sidekick team used LLM judges to automatically curate training data and teach domain-specific models how to refuse impossible queries.
item.dc:creator: Shuang XieShuang Xie

item.title: Quick: An internal hosting platform for the AI era (2026)
item.description: Quick lets anyone at Shopify ship a site in seconds. It has changed the culture of how we build and share.
item.dc:creator: Daniel BeauchampDaniel Beauchamp

item.title: We replaced Redis with MySQL for inventory reservations—and it scaled (2026)
item.description: How we used SKIP LOCKED, composite primary keys, and connection visibility to hit our scale targets.
item.dc:creator: Emilie NoelEmilie Noel

item.title: Flow generation through natural language: An agentic modeling approach (2026)
item.description: We fine-tuned Qwen3-32B into a tool-calling agent that generates Flow automations: 2.2x faster, 68% cheaper, with a weekly retraining flywheel.
item.dc:creator: Ted ChaiwachirasakTed Chaiwachirasak

item.title: Autoresearch isn’t just for training models (2026)
item.description: How we cut our CI pipeline build time by 65% and open-sourced the project.
item.dc:creator: David CortésDavid Cortés

item.title: Building a Magic Mirror: AI retail experiences with Remix (2026)
item.description: How we built a configurable in-store AI experience that any merchant can adapt to their brand.
item.dc:creator: Nikola DracaNikola Draca

item.title: Shopify’s journey to faster breadth-first GraphQL execution (2026)
item.description: We questioned why conventional GraphQL execution incurs hidden costs, and rewrote it in a faster breadth-first manner to avoid them.
item.dc:creator: Greg MacWilliamGreg MacWilliam

item.title: 2,000 robots walk into a shop: Simulated A/B testing (2026)
item.description: No traffic? No problem. SimGym sends hundreds of AI shoppers through your store to simulate A/B tests. A Shopify and NVIDIA collaboration.
item.dc:creator: Javier MorenoJavier Moreno

item.title: The generative recommender behind Shopify's commerce engine (2026)
item.description: From raw event sequences to real-time predictions: what it took to build and ship a generative recommender at commerce scale.
item.dc:creator: Yang LiuYang Liu

item.title: SkyPilot at Shopify: Multi-cloud GPUs without the pain (2026)
item.description: GPUs are annoying. Shopify uses SkyPilot to make them less so: one YAML file, multiple clouds, clean development ergonomics.
item.dc:creator: Javier MorenoJavier Moreno

item.title: Building the Universal Commerce Protocol (2026)
item.description: Under the hood of UCP: the open protocol powering agentic commerce, enabling AI agents to discover, negotiate, and transact with any merchant.
item.dc:creator: Ilya GrigorikIlya Grigorik

item.title: Tangle: An open-source ML experimentation platform built for scale (2025)
item.description: Tangle saves months of compute time, makes every experiment automatically reproducible, and allows teammates to share computation without coordination.
item.dc:creator: Shopify EngineeringShopify Engineering

item.title: Behind the build: 2025's BFCM globe in a pinball machine 🌎🕹️
item.description: Our interactive, real-time visualization of sales made by Shopify-powered merchants worldwide—built into a pinball game.
item.dc:creator: Shopify EngineeringShopify Engineering

item.title: Run for your money: Engineering a treadmill that prints store credit (2025)
item.description: We combined FTMS sensors, Socket.IO, and POS UI extensions to turn a manual treadmill into a discount-printing machine.
item.dc:creator: Nikola DracaNikola Draca

item.title: How we prepare Shopify for BFCM (2025)
item.description: Nine months of chaos engineering and scale tests so intense we ran them (mostly) at night. Inside our 2025 readiness program for Black Friday weekend.
item.dc:creator: Shopify

item.title: Building world-class product search at Shopify: Where C++ excellence meets ML innovation (2025)
item.description: Learn how we solved a major search engineering dilemma—running machine learning models at native C++ speed.
item.dc:creator: Mikhail ShakhrayMikhail Shakhray

item.title: How AI Agents are Evolving Shopify's Product Taxonomy at Scale (2025)
item.description: Our prior work used Vision Language Models for automatic product classification. This post delves into how AI agents are evolving the taxonomy itself.
item.dc:creator: Kshetrajna RaghavanKshetrajna Raghavan

item.title: Migrating to React Native's New Architecture (2025)
item.description: Shopify successfully migrated two of its largest apps, Shopify Mobile and Shopify Point of Sale (POS) to React Native's New Architecture while maintaining weekly releases and serving millions of merchants. This migration involved a complex codebase with hundreds of screens and native modules, extensive custom components, and deep integration with first-party libraries like FlashList.
item.dc:creator: Thiago MagalhaesThiago Magalhaes

item.title: Building production-ready agentic systems: Lessons from Shopify Sidekick (2025)
item.description: Learn how we evolved our AI assistant architecture and built robust evaluation frameworks for real-world deployment
item.dc:creator: Andrew McNamaraAndrew McNamara
